name: Gruyere Cheese Tartlets
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F (232°C). Bake pastry shells for 7 minutes.
2. Melt butter in a large skillet over low heat.
3. Add onions and sauté until tender and transparent.
4. Arrange a layer of onions at the bottom of each pastry shell.
5. Cover with sliced Gruyere cheese.
6. Top with another layer of onions.
7. In a bowl, combine egg, heavy cream, salt, and pepper. Beat thoroughly.
8. Pour equal amounts of egg mixture into each shell.
9. Bake in a 425°F (218°C) oven for about 15 minutes or until golden brown on the tops.
10. Garnish with fried onion rings and watercress.
